hero.title: Salary Breakdown Calculator
hero.description: Model private salary scenarios with explicit frequency normalization, recurring and one-time components, and estimated net pay.

differences.title: Compensation planning, not payroll
differences.description: Understand user-entered packages without statutory or employer processing.

items.title: Compare periods clearly
items.description: Distinguish weekly, biweekly, semimonthly, monthly, quarterly, and annual pay.

items.title: Keep one-time values visible
items.description: Bonuses and one-time deductions never distort recurring totals.

items.title: Review factual differences
items.description: Same-currency scenarios show differences; cross-currency scenarios do not convert.

feel.title: Transparent and practical
feel.description: Every calculated value has an explicit basis.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No payroll, tax filing, benchmarking, or advice claims.

items.title: Scenarios
items.description: Base salary, currency, period, and work assumptions.

items.title: Components
items.description: Recurring and one-time earnings and deductions.

items.name: Earnings
items.description: Separate recurring values from one-time entries.

items.name: Deductions
items.description: Use fixed, base percentage, or gross percentage methods.

items.name: Currencies
items.description: Never aggregate or convert unlike currencies.

technicalSection.title: Isolated and owner scoped
technicalSection.description: Protected nested APIs preserve salary privacy.
items: Stable operation IDs and generated contracts.
Archived scenarios are read-only until restored.
